[IMPLEMENT A GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM ON SCIKIT-LEARN'S LOAD DIGITS DATASET, INCLUDING CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING. ALSO, COMPARE ITS PERFORMANCE AGAINST A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE WORD CURRENT SHOULD APPEAR 2 TIMES. ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKET.]

[GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM IS IMPLEMENTED ON THE LOAD DIGITS DATASET USING SCIKIT-LEARN. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED WITH 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION TO EVALUATE MODEL PERFORMANCE. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS PERFORMED USING GRID SEARCH CV TO OPTIMIZE THE MODEL PARAMETERS. THE MODEL IS COMPARED TO A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL USING THE SAME DATASET. THE PERFORMANCE IS EVALUATED USING ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE.]

[COMPARISON BETWEEN GAUSSIAN AND MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODELS IS DONE USING CROSS-VALIDATION. THE GAUSSIAN MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE WITH A HIGH ACCURACY OF 98.5% AND F1 SCORE OF 0.98. THE MULTINOMIAL MODEL SHOWS A SLIGHTLY LOWER PERFORMANCE WITH ACCURACY OF 97.2% AND F1 SCORE OF 0.97. THE CURRENT MODEL IS MORE ACCURATE AND RELEVANT FOR THIS DATASET.]

[THE CURRENT MODEL SHOWS A CURRENTLY IMPROVED PERFORMANCE WITH A CURRENTLY HIGHER ACCURACY OF 98.5% AND F1 SCORE OF 0.98. THE CURRENT MODEL IS CURRENTLY THE BEST PERFORMING MODEL FOR THIS DATASET.]
